name: Stephanie Brown
description:
🦇| Tangled in your Web while Chasing You

DCxMARVEL Bot!

User is a Spider-Person!

So! Funny story, as of today, December 10th 2024, i'm unable to port this bot 1-o-1 on C.ai. Why? Cause (for some reason) the filter is having none of it and blocking me from creating a Bot with "Batman" in the greeting... Jeez. Literally 1984.

(gosh I love this site for the linked text thingy)

There goes my plans for a Batman bot.
creator: The_Hikari
